esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver.otel"
| WHERE airflow.dag_processing.processor_timeouts IS NOT NULL
// Processor timeouts are a counter; sum increments in the window
| STATS timeout_count = SUM(airflow.dag_processing.processor_timeouts)
| WHERE timeout_count > 0
